news.summary: On the first papal visit to Spain in 15 years, Leo plans to address political polarization and showcase the Catholic Church as an advocate for migrants and asylum seekers.

news.headline: Rights group says drone strike kills 11 in central Sudan market
news.summary: Emergency Lawyers said dozens were also wounded in the strike that came less than 24 hours after similar drone attacks.

news.headline: Ukrainian drones target St Petersburg in attack Russia calls 'unprecedented'
news.summary: Residents of Russia's second-largest city were urged to stay indoors for the first time since the war started.

news.headline: Senegal's ousted PM Sonko re-elected head of his political party
news.summary: Ousmane Sonko, who was sacked as Senegal's prime minister after a falling-out with President Bassirou Diomaye Faye, was re-elected Saturday as head of his Pan-African Pastef party. news.headline: Missing US student found dead in Japan
news.summary:
An ⁠American student ⁠who disappeared while on ⁠a family holiday in Japan was found dead outside Kyoto, his mother wrote in a social media post on Saturday.

news.headline: C.I.A. Officer Found With Gold Bars Said to Have Created Fake Spy Program
news.summary: A federal judge has ruled that David Rush, the C.I.A. employee, must remain in detention. U.S. officials say Mr. Rush funneled millions in federal funds to himself.

news.headline: US doctor recovers from Ebola in Germany as DRC cases surge to 488
news.summary: Berlin's Charite hospital hailed treatment as a 'significant therapeutic success' as outbreak spreads in DR Congo.

news.headline: Funeral held for baby shot dead by Israeli troops in occupied West Bank
news.summary: The seven-month-old boy's shrouded body was wrapped in a Palestinian flag and carried by his father to the graveyard.

news.headline: Video shows Israeli soldier and settlers assaulting two Palestinians
news.summary: A surveillance camera caught a brutal assault by an Israeli soldier and settlers on two men in the occupied West Bank.

news.headline: Trump AI policy adviser Sriram Krishnan to leave position
news.summary:
A top White House artificial intelligence policy adviser on Saturday said he will leave his position at the end of June, marking the exit of a leading ‌figure helping craft policies for frontier technologies.

news.headline: Palestinian father buries baby killed by Israeli gunfire in West Bank
news.summary: A Palestinian father in Hebron has buried his seven-month-old son after the baby was killed by Israeli gunfire

news.headline: Bernadette Chirac, formidable French first lady dubbed ‘last queen of France’, dies at 93
news.summary:
Bernadette Chirac, the steel-willed former first lady of France who spent 12 years at the Elysee Palace from 1995 to 2007 beside President Jacques Chirac – weathering his notorious infidelities with dry humour while building her own political power base in rural France – has died. She was 93.
